pi_items.source: Task description requires creating SRT files, burning subtitles, scaling to 480p, capturing section thumbnails, and following Section 508 compliance.
Task description covers accessibility compliance (Section 508), subtitles, and education context. Difficulty is very_hard.
Verified via U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics that SOC 25-9031 refers to Instructional Coordinators, commonly known as Instructional Designers. Matches task persona.
Task states 'You are an instructional designer at a university' which fits higher education.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated files created by the setup script using ffmpeg test sources. The required skills involve subtitle creation, burning, resolution scaling, and snapshot capture for accessibility compliance. The assigned occupation (Instructional Designer) correctly corresponds to the Standard Occupational Classification SOC 25-9031 (Instructional Coordinators) and the industry is Higher Education.
